t_ch: 再往下走就是格拉克斯大道——黄金时刻的主干道。
t_en: If we keep going, we'll reach Glaux Avenue, which is the road to Golden Hour.

t_ch: 来——这里！跟上哦。
t_en: Over here! Follow me.

t_ch: 这边这边，给你看个有意思的东西～
t_en: Please come this way. Let me show you something interesting.

t_ch: 看，这尊雕像就是匹诺康尼大名鼎鼎的卡通人物——「钟表小子」！
t_en: Look! That's the statue of Clockie, Penacony's famous cartoon character!

t_ch: 来自匹诺康尼最长久、最著名的卡通动画，讲述了主人公钟表小子与他的伙伴们，在美梦小镇中生活的冒险故事——至今已经连载万集以上了！
t_en: It's the oldest and most famous animation from Penacony. It follows the adventurous life of Clockie and his friends in the town of Dreamville. To date, over <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> episodes have aired!

t_ch: 好可爱一钟表。
t_en: He looks cute.

t_ch: 是啊，我也觉得他很可爱！
t_en: I know, right? Isn't he adorable?

t_ch: 好抽象一钟表。
t_en: His character design is a little... surrealist.

t_ch: 呃…是因为动画风格比较复古吧。
t_en: Um... I guess it's because the animation has a retro style.

t_ch: 这个形象真的没有风险吗…
t_en: Isn't having a clock as a character a bit... ominous?

t_ch: 欸，风险？为什么？钟表小子可是匹诺康尼家喻户晓的大明星，应该没什么问题…吧。
t_en: Ominous? Clockie is a household name here. There would never be anything ominous about him... right?

t_ch: 不过你知道吗？据说钟表小子的原型，就是那位大名鼎鼎的——「钟表匠」。
t_en: By the way, do you know that Clockie's design is said to be inspired by none other than the legendary Watchmaker?

t_ch: 钟表匠？
t_en: Watchmaker?

t_ch: 这人很有名吗？
t_en: Is he famous?

t_ch: 你竟然不知道？他可是匹诺康尼历史上的传奇大亨，梦境世界的奠基人，将「梦想」化作现实的人！
t_en: I can't believe you haven't heard of him. He was a legendary tycoon in the history of Penacony — the founder of the Dreamscape, the man who turned dreams into reality!

t_ch: 关于钟表匠的出身，人们众说纷纭：有人说他是来自天外的行商，有人说他是监狱星的囚犯，还有人说钟表匠只是一个符号，其实根本不存在这号人物……
t_en: There are different stories out there about the Watchmaker's origin. Some said he was a traveling merchant from beyond the sky, some claimed that he was exiled to Penacony as a prisoner... Some speculate that he wasn't even a real person, just a symbol...

t_ch: 没人知道他究竟是什么来历，但人人都想复现他的成功，成为下一个钟表匠！
t_en: The true story is anyone's guess, but everyone aspires to emulate his success and be the next Watchmaker!

t_ch: 他的事迹传向银河，令那些心怀梦想的人们蜂拥而至，一场又一场宴席造就了如今的盛会之星。在匹诺康尼，这个名字无人不知，无人不晓。
t_en: As his inspiring story became known across the cosmos, those with a dream flocked to Penacony in droves. They held feast after feast, eventually building the Planet of Festivities we have today. Everyone in Penacony knows this name.

t_ch: 虽然动画里的「钟表小子」只是个冒冒失失的吹牛大王…不过，我还是最相信钟表匠是一位无名客的说法！毕竟开垦梦境这种事，听着就很「开拓」！
t_en: The cartoon character Clockie is portrayed as reckless and full of hot air, but I believe the real Watchmaker was a Nameless! After all, creating the Dreamscape sounds like just the kind of thing a Trailblazer would do.

t_ch: …啊！我突然意识到——如果钟表匠真是无名客，那他岂不是你的老前辈？哎，你想和他拍照留个念吗？我可以帮你哦。
t_en: ...Hold on... If the Watchmaker really was a Nameless, wouldn't that make him your predecessor? Would you like to take a picture with him?

t_ch: 那就麻烦你了。
t_en: Thanks.

t_ch: 小事～来，把手机给我吧。
t_en: My pleasure! Here, give me your phone.

t_ch: 不了，我对摄像头过敏…
t_en: I think I'll pass. I'm allergic to camera lenses...

t_ch: 这样啊…那我们就去别的地方吧。
t_en: I see... Let's go somewhere else then.

t_ch: 不会要收费吧…
t_en: Aha, I know how this goes. You're gonna charge me a lot just for taking the pic, aren't you?

t_ch: 当然不用啦！说什么呢。
t_en: Of course not! What were you thinking?

t_ch: 嗨！嗨嗨嗨！
t_en: Hey! Hey, hey, hey!

t_ch: 救救！救救啾！
t_en: Help! Help me!

t_ch: 你似乎听到了某种细嫩又尖锐的求救声。如无意外，这可怜的呼喊应该是钟表小子……
t_en: You hear a pitiful cry for help. The cry is...

t_ch: …的眼睫毛发出来的。
t_en: ...coming from the Clockie's eyelashes.

t_ch: 咦，怎么了？钟表小子脸上有什么东西吗？
t_en: Eh, what's that? It looks like there's something on Clockie's face.

t_ch: 救救！救救啾！揪我出来啾！救救啾！
t_en: Help! Help me! Pull me out! Help me!

t_ch: 钟表小子的眼睫毛似乎在请求你把它揪出来——这听起来可真是太*梦境*了。所以，你会怎么做？
t_en: The eyelashes are begging to be pulled out — which feels a little too much like a dream.

t_ch: 你想合影留念吗？那就把手机交给我吧，我来拍～
t_en: You want a photo with him? Sure! Please give me your phone. I'll take it for you!

t_ch: 好啦！看上去真不错，你好上相呀。
t_en: It's done! It came out great — you're very photogenic.

t_ch: 救救！救救我啾！揪我出来啾！啾！
t_en: Help! Help me! Pull me out! Please!

t_ch: 虽然你与钟表小子合了一张完美的影，但那撮眼睫毛似乎并不领情。
t_en: You took a nice pic with Clockie.

t_ch: 它依旧喋喋不休，希望有人——意思是*你*——能来救救可怜的它。
t_en: But the eyelashes are still begging for help.

t_ch: 嗨！嗨嗨嗨！谢谢，你！美丽的，人！
t_en: Hey! Hey, hey, hey! Thank... you, beautiful person!

t_ch: 我会，报答你！到大树，去！到大树，去！我会，给，你好看的！
t_en: I'll... repay your kindness! Go to... the tree! Please go... there! There! I'll show... you something... nice!

t_ch: 诶嘿～
t_en: *Tweet*

t_ch: 发出一声可爱又古怪的啼叫后，这只有棱有角的小鸟飞向了远方。
t_en: After letting out an adorable chirp, the bird flies away.

t_ch: 它在临走前似乎提到了「报答」——前提是要你到一个叫「大树」的地方去。
t_en: Before it left, it seems to have offered some kind of "reward." The main thing is that you need to go to "the tree" first.

t_ch: 或许…你可以在那里和它重逢，看看那「好看的」东西究竟是什么。
t_en: Perhaps... you can meet with it again there. See just what exactly the "nice" thing is.

t_ch: 钟表小子的雕像…怎么了吗？你刚才怎么突然跳起来了？
t_en: Is there something wrong with Clockie's statue? Why did you suddenly jump just now?

t_ch: 我救了一只有棱有角的小鸟。
t_en: I rescued a bird — a bird with sharp edges and points.

t_ch: 有棱有角的小鸟…可我好像什么都没看见欸。
t_en: A bird with sharp edges and points... Umm, I don't think I saw it.

t_ch: 我把他的眼睫毛拔下来了。
t_en: I pulled out his eyelashes.

t_ch: 眼睫毛？可钟表小子没有那种东西呀……
t_en: Eyelashes? Clockie doesn't have those...

t_ch: 原来我还能跳啊…
t_en: I can actually jump in this world!? Color me surprised!

t_ch: 是哦，你刚才跳起来了…很突然。
t_en: Really? You jumped just now — it was really sudden, too.

t_ch: 嗯…既然你没事，那我们就出发去下一站吧。离这里不远，跟我来～
t_en: Well... If you're okay, let's move on to the next stop, which is just a stone's throw away from here. Please follow me...

t_ch: 看到远处那座建筑了吗？那就是著名的「大剧院」——匹诺康尼的另一个重要地标！
t_en: Can you see that building in the distance? That's the famous Grand Theater, another great landmark of Penacony!

t_ch: 有没有觉得它的轮廓很独特？因为在现实中，它曾是阿斯德纳的中央监狱。是家族在梦境中将其修葺一新，改造成如今光芒万丈的匹诺康尼大剧院。
t_en: Has a pretty unique shape, doesn't he? In the real world, it was originally the central prison of Asdana. The Family renovated it in the Dreamscape and transformed it into the glorious Penacony Grand Theater.

t_ch: 从建成的那一刻起，大剧院便不断地为整个美梦世界奏响《谐乐颂》。
t_en: Since the moment it was built, the Grand Theater has graced the entire Dreamscape with its rendition of the Odes of Harmony.

t_ch: 而在一纪一度的谐乐大典上，家族成员会在剧院中齐聚，恭迎{RUBY_B#「同谐」的化身}「齐响诗班」{RUBY_E#}降临，为匹诺康尼带来恒久安宁的祝福。
t_en: During the once-in-an-era Charmony Festival, Family members will gather at the theater to welcome the {RUBY_B#Embodiment of Harmony}Harmonious Choir{RUBY_E#} that blesses Penacony with everlasting peace.

t_ch: 我们所在的地方，正是黄金时刻中最好的观景地点！你看，这里还专门设置了望远镜呢！这一纪的谐乐大典马上要开幕啦，记得提前来这里占位哦。
t_en: And here we are! The best viewing spot in all of Golden Hour! Look, there's even a telescope here! When the Charmony Festival arrives, remember to be here early if you wanna get a seat.

t_ch: 接下来带你去个能好好玩的地方。
t_en: Next, I'll bring you somewhere you can really have fun.

t_ch: 前面就是苏乐达主题休闲区——「艾迪恩公园」。这里人多，要跟紧我哦。
t_en: That place up ahead is Aideen Park — everything here is themed around SoulGlad. It's a little crowded, so make sure you stay close to me.

t_ch: 这里就是黄金时刻规模最大的公园，也是匹诺康尼汽水文化的标志——那座超级巨大的汽水瓶，就是苏乐达企业的总部大楼！
t_en: This is the largest park in Golden Hour — it represents the soda culture of Penacony. That gigantic soda bottle houses the headquarters of the SoulGlad Enterprise!

t_ch: 据说，苏乐达起源于监狱时期流行的甜味药水，由苏萨先生发明，因此得名苏萨水。后来星际行商艾迪恩发现其中商机，便买下了苏萨水的配方。
t_en: SoulGlad is said to have originated from a sweet medicinal syrup popular during the Prison Era. Invented by a man named Sousa, it was thus called the Sousa Juice. Aideen, an interstellar traveling merchant, saw the potential in the beverage and purchased the formula.

t_ch: 他在其中打入大量气泡，更名为「苏乐达」，还创造了「糖浆主义」——声称饮用苏乐达是一种全新的生活方式，并借此缔造了如今的商业奇迹。
t_en: Aideen then carbonated the beverage and renamed it "SoulGlad." He also pioneered the school of thought known as "Syrupism," in which he promoted the consumption of SoulGlad as a new kind of lifestyle. And just like that, he created a commercial miracle.

t_ch: 你知道吗？苏萨水最初的配方中，有一种被称作梦见草的原料彻底灭绝了。所以现在只有在匹诺康尼的梦里才能尝到「元年苏乐达」的味道。
t_en: Did you know? One of the ingredients in the original recipe for Sousa Juice, known as Dreamleaf, has gone extinct. That means the only place you can get a taste of Epochal SoulGlad is in Penacony's Dreamscape.

t_ch: 也只有在这里，你才能充分理解「糖浆主义」的真正内核……
t_en: This is also the only place where one can fully experience the core values of Syrupism...

t_ch: 她突然顿住了。你注意到某一瞬间，女孩的目光变得小心谨慎，直刺向你的眉心，又或是你身后的某处……
t_en: She abruptly freezes. In that fleeting moment, you notice a cautious shift in the girl's gaze, piercing directly into your brow, or perhaps somewhere behind you...

t_ch: 怎么了？
t_en: What's up?

t_ch: 你在看什么？
t_en: What are you looking at?

t_ch: 下一刹那，女孩温和的面容恢复如初。她向你报以一个恰到好处的微笑。
t_en: Firefly returns to her warm and gentle disposition.

t_ch: …事不宜迟，我带你四处转转吧！
t_en: ...Time waits for no one! Let me show you around!

t_ch: 这些正在演奏自己的乐器们，被称作「美梦剧团」。
t_en: See these musical instruments playing themselves with no human performers? That's the Sweet Dreams Troupe.

t_ch: 在匹诺康尼之梦中，有许多物品、设施受到忆质影响，拥有了自我意识。它们被家族驯化，成为了服务宾客的美梦剧团。
t_en: In Penacony, many objects and facilities have gained self-awareness due to the influence of the memoria. After being tamed by The Family, some of them formed the Sweet Dreams Troupe to provide entertainment for guests.

t_ch: 不过，这些小东西也会受到危险的情绪或记忆影响，变成四处破坏的「惊梦剧团」…如果不小心撞上了，一定要向附近的安保人员求助哦。
t_en: Be careful, though — sometimes these animated objects can be affected by dangerous emotions or memories and transform into the destructive Dreamjolt Troupe... If you ever run into them, go ask the security guards nearby for help.

t_ch: 呀，那有一位游乐设施的管理员！
t_en: Hey, there's a ride attendant over there!

t_ch: 我去帮你领些「艾迪恩代币」吧——这样你就可以随意游玩这些游乐设施了。
t_en: Let me get some Aideen Tokens for you. With those, you'll be able to try any of the attractions here that you fancy.

t_ch: 您好，管理员先生。我的朋友是第一次来匹诺康尼，可以为{M#他}{F#她}兑换一些艾迪恩代币吗？
t_en: Hi, there. This is my friend's first visit to Penacony. May I get some Aideen Tokens for {M#him}{F#her}?

t_ch: 当然没问题，请出示一下您的梦境护照。
t_en: Of course. Please show me your Dreamscape Pass.

t_ch: 姓名——{NICKNAME}…好了，请拿好您的护照和这些代币。祝您游戏愉快。
t_en: Name— {NICKNAME}... Here's your Dreamscape Pass and tokens — be sure to keep a good hold of them! Have a good time!

t_ch: 一共有多少代币呢？
t_en: How many tokens are there?

t_ch: 总共十枚哦。您现在可以尽情享受匹诺康尼的各种游乐设施了。
t_en: Ten. You may now enjoy the attractions in Penacony to the fullest.

t_ch: 谢谢您！{NICKNAME}，我们快去体验下附近的游乐设施吧，目标就暂定为——用光所有代币！
t_en: Thanks! {NICKNAME}, let's try out some of the games nearby. Our goal is to use all the tokens!

t_ch: 大玩特玩！
t_en: Let's live it to the fullest!

t_ch: 好耶，大玩特玩——
t_en: Let's do it!

t_ch: 压力很大…
t_en: That's a lot of pressure...

t_ch: 不会的，这个玩起来很快的，一眨眼就输…就花光了！你试试就知道啦！
t_en: Not at all! You're going to lose — I mean — spend all of them in no time once you start playing! Just try it and you'll see!

t_ch: 我看看，先玩什么好呢……
t_en: Let me see which one we should try first...

t_ch: 考虑到你是第一次来，不如就从最简单的开始吧，美梦排排乐和幸运转盘都很容易上手哦。
t_en: Since this is your first time here, I say we start with the easiest games. The Dreamy Slots and Lucky Wheel are pretty straightforward.

t_ch: 你先玩哦，我去买点喝的。
t_en: You keep playing. I'll go and get some drinks.

t_ch: （流萤好慢啊…怎么还没回来？咦，她往酒水吧方向去了…）
t_en: (What's taking Firefly so long? Eh, she's heading toward the bar...)

t_ch: （点数全部花完了，去找流萤吧。）
t_en: (I've used up all the tokens. Time to meet Firefly.)

t_ch: 呀…怎么啦，已经玩够了吗？
t_en: What do you say? Ready to call it a day?

t_ch: 正好，我也有点累了。我们在酒水吧坐会儿吧。
t_en: I'm a bit tired too. Let's sit down at the snack bar for a while.

t_ch: 玩得还开心吗，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: Did you have fun, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 这片梦想之地——匹诺康尼——「黄金的时刻」，还是很棒的，对不对？
t_en: Penacony's Golden Hour is pretty amazing, isn't it?

t_ch: 还不错，这里的一切都很梦幻。
t_en: It's nice. Everywhere is just magical.

t_ch: 是啊，一个博爱而宽容的梦…就像家族本身。
t_en: I know, right? It's a dream that's loving and forgiving to everyone, just like The Family.

t_ch: 你听起来有些悲伤…为什么？
t_en: You sound a bit sad...?

t_ch: 倒也谈不上悲伤。只是…这梦境太过博爱，太过宽容了。
t_en: I'm not sad. It's just that... this dream is so loving and forgiving.

t_ch: 一般般，比不上我去过的其他世界。
t_en: It's alright. I've seen better places on other worlds.

t_ch: 不愧是无名客。但对我来说…家族的「万众一心」铸就了它，也让这梦境变得博爱而宽容，就像家族本身。
t_en: I'm not surprised to hear that from a Nameless. If you ask me, I'd say it was the unity of The Family that brought this dream into existence — and the dream has become just as loving and forgiving as The Family.

t_ch: 它浩瀚，又深沉。像一片海洋，就连籍籍无名的小人物也可以安眠其中。
t_en: It's vast and deep like an ocean. Even the humblest people can find solace here.

t_ch: …我真的很感谢，你选择出手相助。也因此，我才能向你介绍这座乐园——它愿意接纳我，尽管我不属于这里。我也爱它，所以才想要…同别人分享。
t_en: ...I really appreciate your help earlier today — that's why I took the chance to introduce this beautiful place to you. It was willing to accept me, even though I didn't belong here. I've grown very fond of this place, and that makes me want to... share it with others.

t_ch: 你不是本地人吗？
t_en: Aren't you a local?

t_ch: 我是…至少现在是……
t_en: I am... At least for now...

t_ch: 不要把情感寄托在这种东西上。
t_en: You shouldn't attach your feelings to stuff like this.

t_ch: 你说得对…但人们无所依靠时，总归会想要找些什么来安慰自己的。
t_en: You're right... But when people have nothing to rely on, they always seek out things to find comfort in.

t_ch: 难道…你真的是偷渡犯？
t_en: Are you... really a stowaway?

t_ch: 我…我是有合法身份的…现在……
t_en: I... I'm a lawful resident... at least now I am...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，能再靠近些吗？——再近些，我想问你一个问题……
t_en: {NICKNAME}, could you come closer? Closer, please. I have a question for you...

t_ch: …请问，你是一个人来匹诺康尼的吗？
t_en: ...Did you travel here alone?

t_ch: 我的朋友去其他梦境了。
t_en: My friends went to the other Dreamscapes.

t_ch: 哦，原来如此……
t_en: Oh, I see...

t_ch: 我是。至少现在是。
t_en: I am. At least for now.

t_ch: 这样啊，我明白了……
t_en: I see...

t_ch: 这取决于你想做什么。
t_en: It depends on what you want to do.

t_ch: 你或许意识到了，也可能没有，但我刚才一直在带你绕远路，去各种各样的地方，这是因为……
t_en: I'm not sure whether you have realized it or not, but I took you through a very long, scenic route and visited all kinds of places just now because...

t_ch: …因为有人在跟踪你。
t_en: ...someone's been following you.

t_ch: ——别回头。我确定他的目标就是你，从我们和加拉赫先生告别起就没跟丢过。
t_en: Don't turn around. I'm certain that you're his target. He's been on our tail since we parted ways with Mr. Gallagher.

t_ch: 我想过这人是不是你的朋友，但直觉告诉我不是。
t_en: I wondered whether he was a friend of yours, but my instinct told me he wasn't.

t_ch: 他身高大约一米八上下，误差在两公分以内，体格健壮，明显锻炼过。步幅很长，但听不见踏地声，很轻巧。这种步法不会留下脚印……
t_en: He's about 5 feet <unbreak>11</unbreak> inches tall, give or take. Judging from his strong build, it's clear that he's well-trained. He walks in long strides, but his steps are light and barely audible. That way of walking doesn't leave footprints...

t_ch: …看来他很擅长战斗——隐秘的那种。他手掌宽大，但手指细长、灵活。我猜他习惯用刀。短刀，匕首……
t_en: ...He looks like a skilled fighter, the covert kind. He has large palms, yet his fingers are slender and nimble. I reckon he has experience using knives, like a short sword or dagger...

t_ch: 你认识这么一个人吗？酒红色外套，绿眼睛，深蓝色头发……
t_en: Do you know anybody like that? A maroon jacket, emerald eyes, dark blue hair...

t_ch: 啊…他来了！
t_en: Ah... He's coming our way!

t_ch: 哟，这不是我忠实的大顾客——{NICKNAME}嘛！
t_en: Hey, well if it isn't my most loyal customer, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 真是好久不见啊，亲爱的！
t_en: It's been such a long time, old friend!

t_ch: 没想到能在这儿遇见你——哎呀，我真是走大运了！
t_en: What a coincidence to run into you here! Oh, my! I'm in luck today!

t_ch: 桑博？！
t_en: Sampo!?

t_ch: 对，你的老朋友桑博！如假包换！
t_en: Yes, it's none other than your old friend, Sampo!

t_ch: 你怎么会在这儿？！
t_en: What brings you here?

t_ch: 我不会在做梦吧…
t_en: I can't be dreaming, can I...

t_ch: 说笑了伙计，这是匹诺康尼——你就是在做梦啊！
t_en: You're such a hoot, buddy. This is Penacony, of course you're in a dream!

t_ch: 见到我是不是很意外？这都是多亏了你——雅利洛-VI现在可是门户大开啊！
t_en: You're surprised to see me? You know, it's thanks to you that I can be here — you helped Jarilo-VI open up to the outside!

t_ch: 呃…这位是？
t_en: Um... this gentleman is?

t_ch: 诶哟，三月姑娘，你这就不记得我了？亏我在贝洛伯格帮了你们那么多忙……
t_en: Oh, Miss March! Don't you remember me? After all the favors I did for you all in Belobog...

t_ch: 她是流萤，是我的向导。
t_en: This is Firefly. She's my tour guide.

t_ch: 你什么眼神，三月七长这样？
t_en: You should get your eyesight checked. Are you sure March 7th looks like this?

t_ch: …我叫流萤，是鸢尾花家系的艺者。
t_en: ...My name is Firefly. I'm a stage performer from the Iris Family.

t_ch: 喔！原来是这样，我就说——也没过去多久，三月姑娘这变化也忒大了。
t_en: Oh, no wonder! I was just thinking, there's no way Miss March could change her appearance so dramatically in such a short time.

t_ch: 幸会，幸会！我叫桑博，是{NICKNAME}的老朋友，请多关照！
t_en: It's my pleasure to meet you! My name is Sampo — and I'm an old pal of {NICKNAME}'s.

t_ch: 幸会，幸会！
t_en: Nice to meet you, too.

t_ch: 哈哈，咱俩的电波可是越来越一致了！
t_en: Haha, seems like we're getting on the same wavelength now!

t_ch: 谁跟你是朋友…
t_en: Since when did I acknowledge you as my friend?

t_ch: 哎哎，别这样，多生分啊。
t_en: Oh, don't be like that. You're making things awkward.

t_ch: 流萤，我们走。
t_en: Firefly, let's go.

t_ch: 哎哎，别这样！咱俩好容易再见一面，怎么说走就走？
t_en: Come on! It's been so long since we last met each other. How can you just walk away like that?

t_ch: 桑博先生…在匹诺康尼做什么？
t_en: Mr. Sampo, what's the purpose of your visit to Penacony?

t_ch: 做什么？哈哈，姑娘这话有意思，在匹诺康尼还能做什么？无非就是到处转转，做做白日梦…度假呗。
t_en: My purpose? Haha, you're funny. What else can I do in Penacony? Well, I just hang around, daydream, and do the things that anyone on vacation would do.

t_ch: 哎，说到这个，正好——伙计，咱俩难得在这匹诺康尼见上一面，不如让我带你们在这附近好好逛逛吧。
t_en: Speaking of which... Old pal, since fate brings us here, I'm obliged to give you a tour of this area.

t_ch: 我观察你们好久了，流萤小姐固然了解匹诺康尼，但要论「大人的娱乐」…恐怕还是我桑博更胜一筹啊。
t_en: I've been watching you two for a long time. Miss Firefly does know Penacony well, but when it comes to "entertainment for grownups," I think I can do much better.

t_ch: …大人的娱乐？
t_en: ...Entertainment for grownups?

t_ch: 看来我说中了？来吧，二位——让我老桑博带你们好好体验一下大人的世界！
t_en: Looks like my analysis is spot-on. Follow me, you two. Let me give you a taste of the adult world!

t_ch: 哦！上手就命中了，状态不错呀！
t_en: Wow! You won something on your first attempt! Impressive!

t_ch: 天啊，头等奖…你的运气也太好了吧！
t_en: Holy moly, it's the grand prize... Today must be your lucky day!

t_ch: 要绕到对面，恐怕得跑好长一段路——各位，咱们坐弹球机蹦到对岸去吧！
t_en: It takes a long time to reach the other side on foot. How about we just bounce over there using the pinball machine!

t_ch: 弹球机？{M#他}{F#她}还没适应梦境，这恐怕会很危险……
t_en: Pinball machine? {M#He}{F#She}'s not fully acclimated to the Dreamscape yet. This could get dangerous...

t_ch: 危险？流萤小姐，这可是家族的美梦，怎么会有危险？在梦里不找点刺激怎么行！
t_en: Dangerous? Miss Firefly, we're in a beautiful dreamland crafted by The Family. How could it be dangerous? This is the perfect place to have some thrills!

t_ch: 来吧，{NICKNAME}，向她证明你能行！
t_en: Come on, {NICKNAME}! Show her what you're made of!

t_ch: 哟，保镖大哥！我们又见面了。
t_en: Here we are again, pal!

t_ch: 嗯？哦…是你，又来照顾生意了？
t_en: Eh? Oh... it's you. You here to relax?

t_ch: 对，我今儿想带两位朋友来贵宝地玩一玩，不知道咱这沙龙还有空位嘛？
t_en: Right. I have two friends here who want to come with me. Any seats left inside?

t_ch: 几个人？
t_en: How many of you?

t_ch: 三个。
t_en: Three.

t_ch: 贵宾卡给我看一眼。
t_en: Show me your VIP card.

t_ch: 好嘞，给您掌掌眼！
t_en: No problem! Here it is!

t_ch: 我说你那两位朋友的——你的我早看过了。
t_en: I'm talking about your friends. I've already seen yours.

t_ch: 啊，这…我朋友初来乍到，怎么可能有贵宾卡呢，哈哈。
t_en: Um, well, how can my friends have VIP cards when they've only just arrived, haha.

t_ch: 您通融通融，就用我的卡成么？这两位身份绝对安全可靠，我用我自己的卡做担保！
t_en: Can you make an exception and let them in? I'll provide my VIP card as guarantee that they won't cause any trouble, okay?

t_ch: 这可不行哪，不能坏了规矩。要是没有认证就请回吧。
t_en: No, I can't break the rules. Please go home if you don't have the card.

t_ch: 看来进不去啊。
t_en: Seems like we can't go in.

t_ch: 怎么办？
t_en: What should we do?

t_ch: 算了吧。
t_en: Forget it.

t_ch: 搞什么鬼？
t_en: What the heck is this?

t_ch: 别慌，别慌！让我老桑博想想办法…哦，有了！
t_en: Just stay cool! Let me think of something... Got it!

t_ch: 这样吧，保镖大哥，我们不进去了，您帮我取个东西吧，先前寄存在这儿的——
t_en: Okay, so, we aren't going in anymore. But could you help me pick up something I left inside?

t_ch: 「选择背叛的刹那」、「疑虑的阴云」、「至死不渝的恨」——就跟雷手大姐说是小丑准备的「材料」，她肯定明白。
t_en: "The Moment of Betrayal," "The Cloud of Doubt," and "Everlasting Hatred." Just mention the "Clown's items" to Miss Thunderbolt — she'll understand what I mean.

t_ch: 这都什么玩意？
t_en: What are you talking about?

t_ch: 一些强烈的情感——至于要怎么用，就让我桑博先卖个关子吧！
t_en: Just a few... intense emotions. As far as how we'll use them, you just wait and see!

t_ch: 「小丑」？
t_en: Clown?

t_ch: 嗐，你别急！就让我桑博先卖个关子吧！
t_en: Tsk, just be patient! I'll explain everything when the time comes!

t_ch: 这没问题，我去告诉她。你们几个，在这等会儿。
t_en: Sure thing, I'll deliver your message to her. Please wait here.

t_ch: 取来了。她说光有这些不成，还给你多捎了个「碎梦」，叫你看着办。
t_en: Here's the items you asked for. Miss Thunderbolt said these alone wouldn't be enough. She wanted you to have these Broken Dreams — she said do with them as you see fit.

t_ch: 诶哟，还是大姐想的周到！多谢，多谢。
t_en: Miss Thunderbolt is such a thoughtful person! Thank you so much.

t_ch: 这样就只差一件东西了，咱们得找台附近的街机…哦，巧了不是，沙龙门口就有一台。走走走，给你们看点好玩的。
t_en: Now, we're only short of one item, which we might be able to find in an arcade machine... Coincidentally, there's one at the salon entrance. Let's get moving. I want to show you something fun.

t_ch: 这台电视机…为什么会被丢在路边？
t_en: Why was this TV... dumped on the side of the road?

t_ch: 哈哈，错了，流萤小姐！这是一台街机——不是朋克洛德那种电子垃圾，是更符合「梦境」气质的游戏！
t_en: Haha, I'm afraid you're mistaken, Miss Firefly! This is an arcade! This fine machine has a sense of aesthetics worthy of the Dreamscape — it's nothing like the techy junk you see around Punklorde.

t_ch: 我说，{NICKNAME}，要不要试着碰一下它，看看会发生什么？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, how about you try touching it and see what happens?

t_ch: 试试就试试。
t_en: Couldn't hurt, I guess...

t_ch: 那个…我觉得——只是我觉得——这台电视可能有猫腻。
t_en: Well... I might be totally off base here, but I think there's something fishy with this TV.

t_ch: 不过，你想试试也没问题…我相信你的判断。
t_en: But it's fine if you want to give it a shot... I trust your judgment.

t_ch: 你怎么不试试？
t_en: Why don't you try it yourself?

t_ch: 这不是想让你亲自体验下，嘿嘿。
t_en: I want to let you enjoy this firsthand experience, hee-hee.

t_ch: 当然，我也只是提个建议，你不想试也没问题，大不了我来——
t_en: Of course, it's just a suggestion. If you aren't up for it, I'll do it myself...

t_ch: 你是不是想害我？
t_en: Is this a trap?

t_ch: 那个…我觉得——只是我觉得——这台电视可能有猫腻。
t_en: Well... I do think there's something fishy with this TV.

t_ch: 这可是「家族」的物什，哪能有猫腻呢？但你不想试也没问题，大不了我来——
t_en: This belongs to The Family. How can there be anything wrong with it? If you aren't up for it, I'll just do it myself...

t_ch: 两人不约而同地看向你——准确地说是三人——也包括了屏幕里那正抖动不已的大鼻子墨镜酷哥。
t_en: The two almost synchronously turn their gaze towards you. Or perhaps more precisely, it was three of them — including the guy with a trembling oversized nose and sunglasses on the screen.

t_ch: 你明白，是时候做出抉择了。那么，你想试着碰一下这台电视，看看究竟会发生什么*有趣*的事情吗？
t_en: You know it's time to make a choice. So, do you want to take a chance and touch this television, to see what *intriguing* events might unfold?

t_ch: 碰一下！
t_en: Touch it!

t_ch: 你深呼吸，闭眼，鼓起勇气，将手伸向了面前这台可疑的电视……
t_en: You take a deep breath, close your eyes, muster your courage, and reach out to the suspicious screen in front of you

t_ch: 碰一下！！
t_en: Touch it!!

t_ch: 你深呼吸，闭眼，鼓起勇气，怀抱着视死如归的决心，将手伸向了面前这台可疑的电视……
t_en: You take a deep breath, close your eyes, muster your courage, and with a resolve akin to facing death, you reach out to the suspicious screen before you...

t_ch: 碰一下！！！
t_en: Touch it!!!

t_ch: 你深呼吸，闭眼，鼓起极大的勇气，怀抱着足足有三个感叹号那样沉重的决心，将手伸向了面前这台可疑的电视……
t_en: You take a deep breath, close your eyes, muster great courage, and with a resolve as weighty as three exclamation marks, you reach out to the suspicious screen before you...

t_ch: 这不是没给我其他选项吗？
t_en: Seems like I'm left with no other options.

t_ch: 你说得对，所以你将手伸向了面前这台可疑的电视……
t_en: You reach out to the suspicious screen in front of you...

t_ch: …天哪！
t_en: ...Oh, my!

t_ch: 天啊……
t_en: Wait, what...

t_ch: 你怎么变成这个样子了？！
t_en: Why did you turn into this... thing!?

t_ch: 我不知道啊，怎么回事？
t_en: I have no idea. What happened?

t_ch: 「我不知道啊，怎么回事？」——你很想对二人这么说，但不知怎地，你现在变成了某位…卡通人物。
t_en: "I don't know... What's happening?" — You desperately want to say these, but somehow, you've transformed into a certain... cartoon character.

t_ch: 你的名字叫作「哈努兄弟」，耿直而沉默，是匹诺康尼最负盛名的长篇动画《钟表小子》里行事沉稳可靠、喜欢装酷的狼人老大哥。
t_en: Your name is Hanu, a candid and taciturn figure — a calm, reliable, cool leader of the werewolves from Penacony's famous, long-form cartoon, Clockie.

t_ch: 你默默地守护着美梦小镇的和平。根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
t_en: You silently protect the peace of Dreamville. According to your character traits, you can only make a cool grunting noise as a response right now.

t_ch: 我好像被吸进电视机里了…
t_en: I think I've been sucked into the TV...

t_ch: 「我好像被吸进电视机里了…」——你很想对二人这么说，但不知怎地，你现在变成了某位…卡通人物。
t_en: "Looks like I got sucked into the TV" — You desperately want to say this, but somehow, you've transformed into a certain... cartoon character.

t_ch: 你的名字叫作「哈努兄弟」，耿直而沉默，是匹诺康尼最负盛名的长篇动画《钟表小子》里擅长各种正常或非正常武器的正义使者，狼人老大哥。
t_en: Your name is Hanu, a candid and taciturn figure — a messenger of justice and leader of the werewolves versed in conventional and unconventional arms from Penacony's famous, long-form cartoon, Clockie.

t_ch: 你默默地守护着美梦小镇的和平。根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
t_en: You silently protect the peace of Dreamville. According to your character traits, you can only make a cool grunting noise as a response right now.

t_ch: 天哪，你们真高！
t_en: Gosh, you guys are tall!

t_ch: 「天哪，你们真高！」——你很想对二人这么说，但不知怎地，你现在变成了某位…卡通人物。
t_en: "Goodness me, you guys are so tall" — You desperately want to say this, but somehow, you've transformed into a certain... cartoon character.

t_ch: 你的名字叫作「哈努兄弟」，耿直而沉默，是匹诺康尼最负盛名的长篇动画《钟表小子》里非常爱惜自己帽子的狼人老大哥，也是猎犬家系的吉祥物。
t_en: Your name is Hanu, a candid and taciturn figure — a lover of your hat and leader of the werewolves from Penacony's famous, long-form cartoon, Clockie. You're also the mascot of the Bloodhound Family.

t_ch: 你默默地守护着美梦小镇的和平。根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
t_en: You silently protect the peace of Dreamville. According to your character traits, you can only make a cool grunting noise as a response right now.

t_ch: 发出一声很酷的*哼*。
t_en: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*

t_ch: 你发出了一声很酷的*哼*。天哪，说真的，它真的非常酷。
t_en: You make an extremely cool grunt. Man, really, it was so cool.

t_ch: 你变得好…酷。
t_en: You look so... cool.

t_ch: 你现在真是太酷了，亲爱的！
t_en: You've got swag now, pal!

t_ch: 所以，{NICKNAME}为什么变成这样了……
t_en: So, how did {NICKNAME} turn into that...

t_ch: 不懂了吧，流萤小姐。{M#他}{F#她}刚才被吸入了这台电视，和这位哈努兄弟交换了身体——稍等，再让我仔细看看……
t_en: You don't get it, do you? Well, {M#he}{F#she} was sucked into the TV just now and swapped bodies with Hanu. Hold on, let me take a closer look...

t_ch: …看！这玩意叫作《小小哈努行动》——根据剧情介绍，你是被石头老板的奇怪装置变小了，不得不经历一场惊心动魄的大冒险，用小小的身躯拯救美梦小镇……
t_en: ...Look! The title of this game is Hanu's Adventure. According to the plot synopsis, you have been shrunken down by one of {RUBY_B#Boss}Stone{RUBY_E#}'s devices. You will embark on an epic adventure to rescue Dreamville with your miniature body...

t_ch: 现在，你得完成这位哈努兄弟在卡通里做过的事——或者再碰一碰这台电视机——才能变回来。
t_en: Now, if you want to return to your normal size, you have to do everything that Hanu has done in the cartoon series — or you can just touch this TV.

t_ch: 好吧，那我该做些什么？
t_en: Fine. What do I need to do?

t_ch: 「好吧，那我该做些什么？」——你已经完全理解了状况，决定向你的老朋友请教接下来该如何行动，但你的人物设定不允许你这么做。
t_en: "Alright, then what should I do?" You already completely understand the situations, and decide to ask your old friend about what actions you should take next, but your character design doesn't permit you to do such a thing.

t_ch: 你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
t_en: You can only make a cool grunting noise as a response right now.

t_ch: 你怎么知道的？
t_en: How do you know that?

t_ch: 「你怎么知道的？」——你很想问问你的老朋友为何如此笃定，但你的人物设定不允许你这么做。
t_en: "How do you know?" You really want to ask your old friend how they're so confident, but your character design doesn't permit you to do such a thing.

t_ch: 你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
t_en: You can only make a cool grunting noise as a response right now.

t_ch: 我可不会再相信你了。
t_en: I'm not going to take you at your word again.

t_ch: 「我可不会再相信你了。」——你很想对你的老朋友报以愤怒的回应，但以你现在的状况，你恐怕只能跳起来狠狠击打他的膝盖骨。
t_en: "I will never believe you again." You really want to reply to your old friend in rage, but with your current state, the best you can do is jumping up to strike his knees.

t_ch: 另外，你的人物设定不允许你这么做。你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
t_en: Additionally, your character design will not permit such an action from you. Right now, you can only emit a cool *grunt* as a response.

t_ch: 发出一声很酷的*哼*。
t_en: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*

t_ch: 你发出了一声很酷的*哼*。你有想过吗？如果你可以一直这样酷下去，那为什么还要变回去呢？
t_en: You make a cool grunting noise. Have you thought about why you'd ever change back if you can keep being this cool?

t_ch: 哦，这里还写着「进入门洞以开始冒险」——显然你得从那里钻进去开始你的挑战，亲爱的。
t_en: Oh, here it says, "Enter the door to start your adventure." You have to climb inside from there to start your challenge, pal.

t_ch: …我们会为你加油的，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: ...We'll cheer you on, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 哈哈，当然——祝你旗开得胜，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Haha, of course we will. Good luck, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 呀，{NICKNAME}，你变回来了！
t_en: Oh, {NICKNAME}! You're back!

t_ch: 但你还没完成游戏，对吧？拜托了——我需要通关街机的奖励，才能让你们体验「有趣的东西」。
t_en: You didn't finish the game, did you? Well, I'm going to have to ask you to finish that game — I need those game rewards so I can let you two experience something fun.

t_ch: 那个…桑博先生……
t_en: Well... Mr. Sampo...

t_ch: 你在担心什么吗，流萤小姐？
t_en: Anything bothering you, Miss Firefly?

t_ch: 放心吧，绝对都是符合公序良俗的项目！
t_en: Don't worry! This isn't going to involve anything illegal!

t_ch: 这里是…商业区下层吗？
t_en: Is this... the lower level of the Commercial District?

t_ch: 没错。我们要去的地方就在前面——「皮皮•皮皮西的沙龙」！
t_en: Bingo. Our destination is right there — Peppy Pepeshi's Salon!

t_ch: 这沙龙可不一般。除了皮皮西人，只有拿到贵宾卡的客人才能进。
t_en: This is no ordinary salon. The only guests allowed to enter are the Pepeshi people — or those with VIP cards.

t_ch: 当然——没什么是我桑博搞不定的。
t_en: But then again, nothing is too difficult for Sampo.

t_ch: 那是…电视机吗？
t_en: Is that... a TV?

t_ch: 哈哈哈，可恶的哈努兄弟，我终于抓到你了！
t_en: Hahaha, I've finally caught you, you little Hanu!

t_ch: 看哪，你变得多么小啊——这下你肯定逃不出我的手掌心了！
t_en: Look how small you've become! You won't be able to escape this time!

t_ch: 哦，该死！别动我珍贵的财宝！那可是我辛辛苦苦剥削来的！
t_en: Oh, rats! Hands off my treasures! You've no idea how hard I worked to swindle those off other people!

t_ch: 哈哈哈，看哪，你被挡住了！真是可怜！
t_en: Hahaha! Your way is blocked! How pitiful!

t_ch: 我可不会告诉你这样一个天大的秘密——如果你现在通过电视机再次交换身体，就能随意打破那个障碍物了！哈哈哈！
t_en: There's a huge secret that I would never tell you — if you swap bodies again through the TV, you'll be able to destroy the obstacle and break through! Hahaha!

t_ch: 哦，该死！我讨厌我的嘴巴，它泄露了秘密！
t_en: Argh! I hate my mouth for revealing my secret!

t_ch: 哦，天哪！该死的哈努兄弟，你让我的一切布置都变得没有意义！
t_en: Oh, drat! All my traps are worthless against the likes of you!

t_ch: 我讨厌你那毛茸茸的脑瓜——它实在是太聪明了！
t_en: I hate your furry head! It has such a clever brain!

t_ch: 哈哈哈，没关系！美梦小镇已经被我变成了迷宫——你可别想从管道里钻到对面去！
t_en: Hahaha, it doesn't matter! I've turned the whole of Dreamville into a maze! Just don't try to get to the other side through the pipes!

t_ch: 天哪，别盯着我珍贵的财宝了，也别看向它左边的管道！好吗？
t_en: Oh, just peel your eyes away from my treasures already. Also, don't look at the pipes on the left, alright?

t_ch: 哦，该死的，哈努兄弟！你又坏了我的好事，还抢走了我辛辛苦苦剥削来的财宝！
t_en: Oh, rats! You've foiled my plan again and taken the treasure I worked so hard to snatch away from other people!

t_ch: 好吧，我承认，你又一次拯救了美梦小镇——但我一定会回来的！
t_en: Fine, I'll admit it — you've rescued Dreamville once again. But you just wait... I'll be back!

t_ch: 这条路…我们是要回奥帝购物中心吗？
t_en: This road... Are we heading back to the Oti Mall?

t_ch: 没错，流萤小姐，好东西就在那边。
t_en: That's right, Miss Firefly. That's where the good stuff is.

t_ch: （桑博…到底是什么意思？流萤在隐瞒什么吗？）
t_en: (What did Sampo mean? Is Firefly hiding something?)

t_ch: （…得让她给个说法才行，先找到她吧。应该没走太远……）
t_en: (...I must find her and demand an explanation from her. She shouldn't be too far off...)

t_ch: 你一连发出几个很酷的*哼*，都没能让两人的注意力从电视机转移到你身上。
t_en: You release a series of cool grunts, but they failed to draw the attention of the twosome from the television to you.

t_ch: 看来你得变回原样才行。
t_en: Looks like you have to turn back into how you were.

t_ch: 你回来了，{NICKNAME}！没事吧？
t_en: You're back, {NICKNAME}! Are you alright?

t_ch: 没事。
t_en: I'm alright.

t_ch: 你没事就好！
t_en: I'm glad to hear that!

t_ch: 还挺有意思。
t_en: It was quite fun.

t_ch: 这样吗…总之，没事就好！
t_en: I see... Anyway, I'm glad you're safe!

t_ch: 你想解释什么吗，桑博？
t_en: Do you have anything to say, Sampo?

t_ch: 亲爱的，你表现得真棒！看看这是什么——「片刻自由」——你拿到它了。
t_en: Look at that, you did great! This is the proverbial moment of freedom! You've earned it.

t_ch: 这下就万事俱备，只欠做梦了。跟我来，各位——是时候让你们领略真正的娱乐了！
t_en: Now that we've got everything we need, we just need to go into a dream. Just follow me — you're about to experience the real fun!

t_ch: 欢迎光临梦境贩售店，爱德华医生竭诚为您服务！
t_en: Welcome to Dreamscape Sales Store! Dr. Edward at your service!

t_ch: 星穹列车的开拓客，我们又见面了——哈哈，您还带着两位有趣的朋友呢！
t_en: Trailblazer of the Astral Express, here we are again! Haha, I see you've brought two friends with you! They seem like fun people!

t_ch: 嗨，爱德华医生。我想带朋友们体验一点…有趣的东西，你懂的。
t_en: Hello, Edward. I'd like my friends to try something... fun, if you know what I mean.

t_ch: 当然可以，爱德华医生欢迎追寻刺激的客人！就读取您的梦境可以吗，先生？
t_en: Be my guest! Dr. Edward welcomes anyone who's ready for some excitement! How about we use your Dreamscape, sir?

t_ch: 嗯，就用我的吧。昨晚那个就合适。
t_en: A superb idea, sir — let's do it. The one from last night would be perfect.

t_ch: 呃…这是在做什么？
t_en: Um... What's going on?

t_ch: 为您解释一下，这是本店面向资深客人的服务：您可以将近期体验过的梦境交给我，辅以相关的情绪原型，即可制成可重复体验的个性化梦泡。
t_en: This is a service we offer to our long-time customers. You can submit dreams you've recently had to me. With the relevant emotion prototypes, I'll be able to turn them into customized dream bubbles that can be experienced repeatedly.

t_ch: 想做什么都行？
t_en: Any dreams we want?

t_ch: 对！看来你已经上道了，你也做过那种醒来后意犹未尽的梦，对吧？
t_en: Exactly! Looks like you've got the picture. You've probably woken up from a dream one time, and wished you could just go back to dreaming it, right?

t_ch: 这有什么好玩的？
t_en: What's so fun about this?

t_ch: 这你就不懂了，制成的梦泡好不好玩取决于你做过的梦——每个人都做过那种醒来后意犹未尽的梦，不是吗？
t_en: Well, whether a dream bubble is fun or not depends on what kind of dreams you've had. We all had dreams that we wished we could have continued after waking up, right?

t_ch: 意犹未尽的梦……
t_en: A dream I wished I could have continued after waking up...

t_ch: 看来流萤小姐已经跃跃欲试了。别急，别急，作为示范，这次就先用我的梦感受一下吧。
t_en: Miss Firefly, I admire your eagerness, but please be patient. Allow me to use my dream as a demonstration.

t_ch: 相信您已经准备好了材料，请将它们交给我吧。
t_en: I trust you have prepared all the necessary materials. Please hand them over to me.

t_ch: 感谢您的捐献——读取完成！正在为您调整忆质，生成梦泡……
t_en: Your donation is appreciated! The retrieval is complete. Now, I will calibrate the memoria and generate the dream bubble...

t_ch: 生成完毕！请您闭上眼睛，将额头抵在梦泡上。
t_en: It's ready! Please close your eyes and rest your forehead against the dream bubble.

t_ch: 来吧，{NICKNAME}——祝你度过一段快乐的时光。
t_en: Jump on in, {NICKNAME}. I wish you a pleasant time.

t_ch: 准备好体验美梦了吗？——请您闭上眼睛，将额头抵在梦泡上。
t_en: Are you ready to experience a wonderful dream? Please close your eyes and rest your forehead on the dream bubble.

t_ch: 现在吧。
t_en: I'm ready.

t_ch: 没问题——爱德华医生竭诚为您服务！
t_en: No problem! Dr. Edward is happy to help you when you're ready!

t_ch: 稍后再说吧。
t_en: Maybe later.

t_ch: 没问题——爱德华医生竭诚为您服务！
t_en: No problem! Dr. Edward is happy to help you when you're ready!

t_ch: 哎呀，真遗憾——我还想看看{NICKNAME}要怎么应付垃圾之王呢……
t_en: What a bummer... I was really looking forward to seeing how {NICKNAME} was going to overthrow the Garbage King...

t_ch: 是有点遗憾…
t_en: It really is a shame.

t_ch: 不用看，一拳秒了。
t_en: I'd easily finish him off with one punch.

t_ch: 什么塔塔洛夫，那不就是你…
t_en: The Garbage King? You're the real Garbage King!

t_ch: 可惜啊，可惜！这样一场富有深意的梦，却因为流萤小姐的出手戛然而止……
t_en: What a huge pity! Such a meaningful dream came to an abrupt halt because of Miss Firefly...

t_ch: …我本来还在期待你发现真相的瞬间，会露出什么表情呢。
t_en: ...I was looking forward to seeing your face when the truth dawned on you.

t_ch: 真相？什么真相？
t_en: Truth? What truth?

t_ch: 你想表达什么？
t_en: What are you trying to say?

t_ch: 表达？不，应该是揭露……
t_en: ...Trying to say? I'm not saying anything, I just want to reveal the truth...

t_ch: 这怪梦还有隐喻？
t_en: Is this weird dream trying to hint at some hidden meaning?

t_ch: 隐喻？不，应该是揭露……
t_en: Hint at? No, more like reveal...

t_ch: 有关「美梦」的真相——你不就在寻找它么？别被美景迷惑了，亲爱的，安逸的环境造就盲目的人。
t_en: Don't you want to find out the truth behind the dream? Don't let all the pretty scenery in the dream world distract you from your goal — as soon as you get complacent, you'll lose sight of the truth.

t_ch: 不觉得这梦泡和如今的匹诺康尼很像么，嗯？
t_en: Don't you think this dream bubble looks really similar to modern-day Penacony?

t_ch: 一群居心叵测的人，挤在一片狭小的舞台上，谁都不想暴露在聚光灯下，就把可怜的小灰毛推到台前——
t_en: A small stage is crowded with a bunch of scheming people. None of them want to be exposed under the spotlight, so they all push you to the front...

t_ch: 梦境可不是自家的浴缸，而是变幻莫测的深海，如果要我说得更清楚点——别被诱人的荧光给骗了，如果你折在了那种家伙手里…我可是会非常非常失望的。
t_en: You're not at home anymore kid — you've wandered into the depths of the unknown. Let me put it to you straight — don't let yourself get enticed by that glowing light. I'm going to be very disappointed if you get bamboozled by the likes of them.

t_ch: 你到底在说什么？
t_en: What in the dream world are you talking about?

t_ch: 看来你是真的不懂啊，那就回头看看吧……
t_en: Seems like you really do have no clue. Turn around and take a look...

t_ch: 桑博，你想做什么？
t_en: Sampo, just what are you up to, exactly?

t_ch: 一如既往，伙计。要是你真的不懂，就回头看看吧……
t_en: Same as always, pal. If you still don't get it, just turn around and take a look...

t_ch: 「荧光」…
t_en: A glowing light...

t_ch: ——你看那小姑娘还在么？
t_en: Is that girl still here?

t_ch: 口口声声说自己是匹诺康尼本地人，内行的门路却一点不懂——小偷小摸的本事倒不少，究竟是什么人啊？亲爱的，你就一刻也没怀疑过她？
t_en: She claims to be a local but doesn't know how this world works — all she's got is street smarts. Who exactly is she? You don't find her the least bit... suspicious?

t_ch: 听我一句劝，有什么想问的，快找那姑娘对峙去吧。别让她夹着尾巴逃跑了，哈哈。
t_en: You'd better hurry up and confront her if you have any questions. Don't let her off scot-free, haha.

t_ch: 再见了，伙计…你可千万别让我失望啊。
t_en: See you around, pal... Don't let me down.

t_ch: 女孩侧过身，看向远方，像是在回避你的视线。半晌，她才回头，轻轻开了口。
t_en: The girl turns her body sideways, gazing into the distance, as if evading your gaze. After a momentary pause, she finally turns back and softly speaks.

t_ch: …对不起。
t_en: ...I'm sorry.

t_ch: 不用道歉，我没有怀疑你。
t_en: You don't have to apologize. I don't find you suspicious.

t_ch: …谢谢。
t_en: ...Thank you.

t_ch: 我需要真相。告诉我，好吗？
t_en: I want to know the truth. Is that too much to ask?
...Sure.

t_ch: 你心虚了…是吗？
t_en: You feel guilty, don't you?

t_ch: …是的。
t_en: ...Yes.

t_ch: 我…是向你隐瞒了一些事……
t_en: There are things... I'm hiding from you...

t_ch: 比如我确实不是「本地人」，猎犬家系追捕我不是毫无来由…与你同行也有一些别的原因……
t_en: I'm not a local, and there's a reason why the Bloodhound Family is after me... I also have my own purpose for joining you on your journey...

t_ch: …但感谢你出手相助，是真的。
t_en: ...But still, I appreciate your help. I mean it from the bottom of my heart.

t_ch: 向往无名客也是真的，你们去过很多世界，能见识各种各样的人和事，每一天都是全新的开始……
t_en: And my admiration for the Nameless is also genuine. You guys have been to a lot of worlds, met people from all walks of life, and experienced all sorts of things. Every day is a new beginning for you guys...

t_ch: 我也很喜欢这种生活。
t_en: I really love that kind of life.

t_ch: 倒也没那么好…
t_en: It's not as great as you think...

t_ch: 你也可以登上列车。
t_en: You can board the Astral Express, too.

t_ch: 我想再带你去个地方，可以吗？这次不是什么旅游景点，恰恰相反…大概算是我的「秘密据点」。
t_en: Can I bring you to one more place? It isn't another tourist attraction — it's my very own secret base.

t_ch: 在那里，我会把我所知的一切…尽可能都告诉你。
t_en: I'll do my best to tell you everything I know when we get there.

t_ch: 好，我相信你。
t_en: Sure. I believe you.

t_ch: 谢谢你……
t_en: Thanks...

t_ch: 我该如何相信你？
t_en: How am I supposed to believe you?

t_ch: 我…不知道。但我希望你能相信我……
t_en: I... don't know, but I hope you do.

t_ch: 算了，我不必如此苛责你。
t_en: Never mind. I have no reason to be so harsh on you.

t_ch: 我会始终保持警惕。
t_en: I'm going to be vigilant to the end.
...Sure.

t_ch: （桑博…到底是什么意思？流萤在隐瞒什么吗？）
t_en: (What did Sampo mean? Is Firefly hiding something?)

t_ch: （…得让她给个说法才行，先找到她吧。应该没走太远……）
t_en: (...I must find her and demand an explanation from her. She shouldn't be too far off...)

t_ch: 一阵天旋地转，你发觉自己回到了石头老板的迷宫入口……
t_en: After going all around, you find yourself at the entrance to Boss Stone's maze...

t_ch: 滴答！救命！救命啊！
t_en: Tick-tock! Help! Help me!

t_ch: 要出人命啦！来人啊！
t_en: Someone's dying! Please come here!

t_ch: 发生什么事了？
t_en: What's going on?

t_ch: 我说得很清楚了——要出人命啦！救命！
t_en: Didn't I make myself clear? Someone is dying! Please help!

t_ch: 你在求救吗？
t_en: Are you asking for help?

t_ch: 是啊，是啊！请你帮帮我，不然要出人命啦！
t_en: Yes, yes! Please help! Someone's life is in your hands!

t_ch: 你是个什么…东西？
t_en: What kind of thing... are you?

t_ch: 嘿！我可是块钟表，不是什么「东西」！
t_en: I'm not some random thing, I'm a clock!

t_ch: 嘿，等等——你…能看得到我？
t_en: Wait... Can you... see me?

t_ch: …怎么了？
t_en: ...Is there a problem?

t_ch: 我看到一个…有手有脚的钟表。
t_en: I can see a... clock with limbs.

t_ch: 我好像看到奇怪的东西了…
t_en: I think I'm seeing things...

t_ch: 没什么，不重要。
t_en: Nothing. It's inconsequential.

t_ch: 难道…你真能看得到我？
t_en: Can you really see me?

t_ch: 滴答！太好了！太好了！米沙他有救了！
t_en: Tick-tock! Wonderful! This is awesome! There's still hope for Misha!

t_ch: 各位，请冷静一下……
t_en: Everyone, please stay calm...

t_ch: 不懂规矩的家伙，看我怎么收拾你！
t_en: You broke the rules! And now you're gonna pay the price!

t_ch: <size=36>好啊！老大，好好教训她！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Punish her, boss!</size>

t_ch: 怎么会这样……
t_en: How did it come to this...

t_ch: 那不是米沙吗？
t_en: Isn't that Misha?

t_ch: 咦？米沙是谁？
t_en: Eh? Who's Misha?

t_ch: 那不是黄泉吗？
t_en: Isn't that Acheron?

t_ch: 咦？你认识她吗？
t_en: Eh? Do you know her?

t_ch: 怎么都是熟人啊？！
t_en: How come they are all people I know!?

t_ch: 咦？「都是」是什么意思…？
t_en: What do you mean by "all"?

t_ch: 噢，看吧，看吧！我没有撒谎！米沙遇到危险啦！
t_en: See? I wasn't lying! Misha really is in trouble!

t_ch: 咦，你也能看到我吗？
t_en: Eh, can you see me too?

t_ch: 我能感受到，有些似是而非的事物陪伴在你身旁。可惜我无法像你一样与之沟通。
t_en: I can feel the presence of something inexplicable next to you, but it's a shame that I can't communicate with him like you can.

t_ch: 也许我们都对「忆质」有所反应，才能察觉这些梦中的不可思议之物。而你比我更敏锐。
t_en: We can both perceive these extraordinary things in the dream, probably due to our ability to react to memoria. But you're more attuned to it than I am.

t_ch: 我本以为是那位优雅的忆者在你脑海中留下了什么，现在看来，这梦中和她一样特别的存在不在少数。
t_en: I thought your heightened perception was caused by something the elegant Memokeeper might have left in your mind. Now, it seems to me there are many more special beings like her in this dream.

t_ch: 优雅的忆者？
t_en: The elegant Memokeeper?

t_ch: 「她」是谁？
t_en: Who is she?

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>与你分别后不久，我无意步入一场舞会，一位身披黑纱的女士邀请我共舞一曲。这是我第一次跳舞…是段令人难忘的经历。</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>Shortly after we parted ways, I wandered into a ball without realizing it. A lady wearing a black veil invited me to dance. It was my first dance, and it was an unforgettable experience.</color>

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>与你分别后不久，我在酒店邂逅了一位身披黑纱的女士。她也是受邀前来的客人，向我提起盛会的话题，我们便举起酒杯…相谈甚欢。</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>Shortly after we parted ways, I met a lady wearing a black veil who was also a guest at the hotel. We had a good time talking about the event over drinks.</color>

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>与你分别后不久，我察觉到有人在暗中窥视。循着镜子中的视线，我最终找到了一位身披黑纱的女士，并与她做了些…深入交流。暂且不细述了。</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>Shortly after we parted ways, I felt someone's spying eyes on me. I looked in the mirror and spotted a lady wearing a black veil. We had a deep conversation, but I won't bore you with the details.</color>

t_ch: 可惜，忘了请教她的名字…只知道她来自「流光忆庭」。
t_en: It's a shame that I forgot to ask her for her name. I only know that she's from the Garden of Recollection.

t_ch: 流光忆庭…是那群奉侍「记忆」星神的人吗？
t_en: Garden of Recollection... Is it the group that serves the Aeon of Remembrance?

t_ch: 是啊。他们能以模因的形式穿梭于各个世界，只出现在特定的人眼中——不觉得和你口中的钟表小子很像吗？
t_en: Exactly. They traverse freely between different worlds as memetic entities and are only visible to certain people. Doesn't she sound very much like that Clockie you saw?

t_ch: 到底是家族的盛会，也许应邀而来的客人比我们想象中还要多上许多呢。
t_en: After all, it is a grand event held by The Family. The guestlist could be a lot longer than we imagine.

t_ch: 总之，再次承蒙各位关照。祝你们在梦里过得愉快，我就不打扰二位…约会了？
t_en: Once again, thank you for being kind to me. I wish you a great time in the dream, and I shall not interrupt your... date?

t_ch: 不、不是约会…！
t_en: N—No! We're not on a date!

t_ch: 呵呵。
t_en: Hehe.

t_ch: 哎，我问你哦……
t_en: Hey, let me ask you something...

t_ch: 你吸引女孩子注意的方式，就是大摇大摆地跟踪她么？快半个系统时了哦。
t_en: Is following girls around like a lost puppy your way of getting their attention? You've been doing this for nearly half a system hour.

t_ch: 准确地说，是<unbreak>45</unbreak>分钟。愉快的时光总是过得飞快，不是吗？
t_en: To be more precise, it's been <unbreak>45</unbreak> minutes. Time sure flies when you're having fun, doesn't it?

t_ch: 呵，小孔雀…你有对漂亮的眼珠啊。老家是茨冈尼亚的？
t_en: *sigh* Spare me. Beautiful eyes though — are you from Sigonia?

t_ch: 想要进一步提示吗？比如，我是个{RUBY_B#蜂蜜}埃维金{RUBY_E#}人？
t_en: Need another hint? I'm an {RUBY_B#Honey}Avgin{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 嗯…我的眼睛成色是不如你，但我不瞎……
t_en: My eyes might not be as pretty as yours, but there's no problem with my vision...

t_ch: ——全宇宙有哪个不知道你们茨冈尼亚人？天生的骗子、小偷、交际花…口蜜腹剑，名副其实。
t_en: You Sigonians are notorious throughout the entire universe! Liars, thieves, social manipulators, wolves in sheep's clothing... You're really living up to the reputation.

t_ch: 要我说，比起梦里，你更适合待在窨井盖下…啊，那里就有一只，快去吧～
t_en: I say you belong to the space under the manhole cover, not in a dream. There's one right over there. Off you go!

t_ch: 不必了，阴暗的角落和我气质不搭。还是这座美梦更适合我，轻浮、虚荣、华而不实……
t_en: I'll pass — the gloomy shade of a place like that just wouldn't go with my vibe. Dreamville is frivolous, vain, and flashy — and that suits me just fine.

t_ch: …还不会下雨！我这身行头可娇贵得很哪，禁不起风吹雨淋。
t_en: ...Also, it never rains here! My outfit is too expensive to be exposed to the elements.

t_ch: 收起你那俏皮的舌头，小孔雀。请回吧，我们是愚者，不是傻瓜，不打算和公司的哈巴狗玩朋友游戏。
t_en: Cut it out and go home, you slick talker. We are Fools, but we aren't stupid. We aren't interested in playing the friend game with the lapdogs of the IPC.

t_ch: 哦，这话当真？你从来没和公司的人交过朋友？
t_en: Really? You've never been friends with anyone from the IPC?

t_ch: 当我没读过匹诺康尼历史么？别想把我卷进你们无聊的办公室政治。
t_en: Do you think I know nothing about the history of Penacony? Don't drag me into your banal office politics.

t_ch: 愚者——从应邀参加这场盛会起，你就没得挑了。及时选边站，别让自己血本无归。
t_en: Fool, you've been left with no choice since the moment you accepted the invitation to be here. You better pick a side while you have the chance, or else you'll end up losing everything.

t_ch: 你听起来很有把握嘛～显得你已经把家族那位鸡翅膀男孩搞定了似的。
t_en: You sound very sure of yourself. Looks like you've already convinced that Chicken Wing Boy from The Family.

t_ch: 怎么办到的，小孔雀？脱光衣服向他下跪赔罪，承诺「呜呜呜，公司绝对不会打匹诺康尼的主意」？
t_en: How did you do it, little peacock? Did you strip yourself naked, apologize to him on your knees, and promise that IPC would never harm Penacony?

t_ch: 朋友…得了吧，你们只会把别人当作筹码。
t_en: Friends? Oh, please. You guys only treat others as your bargaining chips.

t_ch: 筹码不好吗？在赌桌上，只有筹码不会把自己赔进去。你看流光忆庭和星穹列车的朋友都明白这个道理，他们就很聪明。
t_en: What's wrong with chips? In any gamble, the only players that will never be on the losing side are the chips. My friends from the Garden of Recollection and Astral Express are all smart enough to understand that.

t_ch: 可聪明的人从一开始就不会入局。你瞧，我是不是更聪明一点？
t_en: But the smarter ones wouldn't have joined the game in the first place. See? I'm smarter.

t_ch: 听好了，小孔雀，你也是收到过「酒馆」邀请的人。想邀假面愚者入伙？可以，动动脑子，{RUBY_B#阿哈}乐子神{RUBY_E#}想要的究竟是什么。
t_en: Listen, little peacock. You've been invited by the Tavern before too. If you want the Masked Fools to get onboard, you need to figure out what it is {RUBY_B#Aha}The Laughter{RUBY_E#} wants.

t_ch: 给你个提示吧：既然你谁也说服不了，何不考虑去找个哑巴做朋友呢？至少他不会反驳你，哈哈。
t_en: Here's a hint for you — Since you can't convince anyone, why don't you befriend a mute? At least, a mute won't be able to refute your arguments. *laughs*

t_ch: 再见了~
t_en: So long!

t_ch: 谢谢！「和哑巴交朋友」——我会铭记在心的！
t_en: Thanks! I'll keep your advice in mind!

t_ch: …真是麻烦。看来，还得再去会会「家族」啊。
t_en: ...What a pain in the neck. I guess I'll have to meet with The Family again.

t_ch: 哦，抱歉，还没有进行自我介绍呢！
t_en: Oops, I haven't introduced myself!

t_ch: 我叫钟表小子，是美梦小镇匹诺康尼的大明星！我和我的朋友们一起守护着这座小镇的和平——他们分别是哈努兄弟、汽水先生、折纸小鸟、仓鼠球骑士……
t_en: My name is Clockie. I'm a famous celebrity in Penacony! My friends and I keep the peace in this small town. They are Hanu, Mr. Soda, Origami Bird, Hamster Ball Knight...

t_ch: …还有米沙！米沙他遇到危险啦——滴答！救命！救命！
t_en: ...And Misha! Misha is in trouble! Tick-tock! Help! Help!

t_ch: 钟表小子，我能帮上你的忙吗？
t_en: Clockie, how can I help?

t_ch: 钟表小子？你是个动画人物？
t_en: Clockie? Are you a cartoon character?

t_ch: 会说话的钟表。我一定是疯了。
t_en: A talking clock? I must be losing my mind.

t_ch: 会说话的钟表？
t_en: A clock that talks?

t_ch: …钟表小子？
t_en: ...Clockie?

t_ch: 你是说…你看到了一个现实中不存在的动画人物？
t_en: Do you mean... you saw a cartoon character that doesn't exist in real life?

t_ch: 是的，我看到了他。
t_en: Yes, I saw him.

t_ch: 不会是幻觉吧…
t_en: I'm not hallucinating... right?

t_ch: 滴答，我当然存在啦！我可是美梦小镇匹诺康尼的大明星，从来不吹牛！
t_en: Tick-tock, I'm really here! As the humble face of Penacony, I never ever brag!

t_ch: 你看不到吗？
t_en: Can't you see him?

t_ch: 呃…在哪儿？我看不到啊……
t_en: Um... Where's he? I can't see him...

t_ch: 滴答！我猜，只有直率、纯真、有童心的孩子才能看见我——比如这位灰色的朋友！
t_en: Tick-tock! I guess I'm only visible to those with the innocence, kindness, and honesty of a child, like this kid here clad in gray!

t_ch: 他说只有孩子能看到他。
t_en: He said only children can see him.

t_ch: 呃，可是你看上去比我大吧，只看外表的话……
t_en: Um, but I think you look older than me in terms of appearance...

t_ch: 他说你不够直率、纯真、有童心。
t_en: He said you weren't innocent, kind... or honest.

t_ch: …我哪里不够直率、纯真、有童心了…！
t_en: ...Just how so!?

t_ch: 滴答，滴答！灰色的朋友！既然你能看到我，那你一定能帮我个忙！
t_en: Tick-tock, tick-tock! My gray friend, since you can see, then you must be able to help me!

t_ch: 我的好朋友米沙，他遇到麻烦了！求求你，救救他吧！不然就要出人命啦！
t_en: My friend, Misha, is in trouble! I'm begging you to help him before it's too late!

t_ch: 他说求我帮帮他…
t_en: He's begging for my help...
Huh...

t_ch: 他说要出人命了…
t_en: He says someone's life is in danger...

t_ch: 欸…这么严重吗……
t_en: Uh... Is it really that bad...

t_ch: 那你要先去帮帮这位…呃，只有你能看到的钟表小子吗？
t_en: Are you going to help this... um, Clockie that only you can see?

t_ch: 我没有怀疑你，毕竟在梦里什么都有可能发生…我说的地方，晚点再去也没问题的……
t_en: I don't think you're lying, as anything can happen in a dream... We can just head to the place I mentioned later...

t_ch: 滴答，滴答！快跟上，快跟上，灰色的朋友！
t_en: Tick-tock, tick-tock! Hurry up and follow me, gray friend!

t_ch: 米沙遇到危险啦！他就在那里，我来带你去！
t_en: Misha's in trouble! He's over there. Let me bring you to him!

t_ch: （米沙这个名字好令人在意…总之先看看发生了什么吧。）
t_en: (The name of Misha rings a bell to me... Anyway, better check out what's going on.)

t_ch: 滴答！求你了，灰色的朋友！帮帮米沙吧！
t_en: Tick-tock! I'm begging you, my gray friend, begging you! Please help Misha!

t_ch: 先跟我说说发生了什么事吧。
t_en: Please fill me in on what's going on first.

t_ch: 你在和钟表小子说话？…嗯，我也很好奇发生了……
t_en: Are you talking to Clockie? ...Hmm, I'm really curious too...

t_ch: 我该怎么帮他？
t_en: What should I do to help him?

t_ch: 你在和钟表小子说话？…是啊，局面看起来要控制不住了……
t_en: Are you talking to Clockie? ..Well, it does look like things are getting out of control...

t_ch: 我的球棒已经等不及了！
t_en: My baseball bat can't wait to show its might!

t_ch: 可是球棒的效率太低…不对！我是说，我们不能用这么粗暴的方式解决问题……
t_en: I'm afraid a baseball bat isn't an efficient weapon... No! What I mean is, we can't solve the problem with violence...

t_ch: 滴答，滴答！场面变得这么混乱，都是石头老板的错！
t_en: Tick-tock, tick-tock! It's all {RUBY_B#Boss}Stone{RUBY_E#}'s fault that things have turned out this way!

t_ch: 石头老板是美梦小镇里最坏的坏蛋——他是个贪心鬼，想要把美梦小镇的镇民都赶走，独占珍贵的石料……
t_en: Of all the lowlifes in Dreamville, {RUBY_B#Boss}Stone{RUBY_E#}'s the worst. He's a greedy man who wants to drive everyone out of Dreamville so that he can have all the precious stones to himself...

t_ch: 于是，他指使自己的手下搅乱了梦境，把大家的好情绪全都抽走了！美梦小镇从此充满了焦虑和纷争，大家再也不是一家人！
t_en: He instructed his underlings to wreak havoc in the Dreamscape, taking away everyone's positive emotions! Since then, the town has been filled with anxiety and disputes! We're no longer a family!

t_ch: 但身为美梦小镇的守护者，钟表小子不能坐视不管——只要使用<color=#dbc291ff>「钟表把戏」</color>，让流淌在梦境的好情绪重新回到人们心里，大家一定能和好如初！
t_en: As the guardian of Dreamville, I can't just sit back and do nothing. By using the power of <color=#dbc291ff>Clockwork</color>, I can direct the flow of positive emotions in the Dreamscape back into people's hearts — that way, everyone can patch up their differences and get along again!

t_ch: 来吧，灰色的朋友！我有种预感，你一定能够学会<color=#dbc291ff>钟表把戏</color>，毕竟你特殊到能够看见我！
t_en: My gray friend, I require your assistance! I have a feeling you'll be able to master the power of <color=#dbc291ff>Clockwork</color>! After all, you're the special one who can see me!

t_ch: 而且你是美梦小镇的客人，石头老板没料到你的存在！如果你出手，那个大坏蛋一定被打得措手不及！
t_en: Also, you're a new visitor to this world, which means we have the element of surprise! If you take action now, we can catch him off guard!

t_ch: 什么钟表把戏？
t_en: What is "Clockwork"?

t_ch: 我这就告诉你！闭上眼睛——
t_en: Here, I'll show you! First, close your eyes...

t_ch: 真的没问题吗…
t_en: Are you sure about this...

t_ch: 没关系，我们至少可以先试试看！闭上眼睛——
t_en: It'll be fine. I'm just demonstrating how it works! Please close your eyes...

t_ch: 你自己怎么不上？
t_en: Why don't you do it yourself?

t_ch: 我自己一个人是用不了<color=#dbc291ff>钟表把戏</color>的，因为他们都看不见我！所以拜托你了，闭上眼睛——
t_en: I can't pull it off on my own, because they can't see me! So, please close your eyes...

t_ch: 滴答！这样我们就是*一心同体*了，有没有感觉力量在体内流动！
t_en: Tick-tock! Now, our minds have merged into one. Can you feel an energy surging through your body?

t_ch: 来吧，现在去找那个生气的帮派老大——施展<color=#dbc291ff>钟表把戏</color>，把好情绪全都灌进去，砰，大功告成！
t_en: All we have to do is use <color=#dbc291ff>Clockwork</color> on that cranky gangster boss and inject good emotions into him — then we'll have won!

t_ch: 一定要记住：绝对不能用<color=#dbc291ff>钟表把戏</color>做坏事——我们可是美梦小镇的守护者，滴答！
t_en: Please bear in mind that you should never use <color=#dbc291ff>Clockwork</color> with malicious intent. We're the guardians of Dreamville, after all, tick-tock!

t_ch: {M#你小子}{F#小丫头}滚一边去，别碍事！我要让那个女人明白自己惹错人了！
t_en: Mind your own business, {M#lad}{F#lass}! I have to let that lady there know she's messed with the wrong person!

t_ch: 施展钟表把戏！
t_en: Here comes the Clockwork!

t_ch: 不打扰你了…
t_en: I'll leave you to it...

t_ch: 咦，你看不到他的内心吗？这下我们该怎么办……
t_en: Eh, can't you see where this is going? What should we do now...

t_ch: …哈哈哈哈哈！
t_en: ...Hahahahaha!

t_ch: 你成功了！可他怎么变成了这个样子？
t_en: You did it! But how did he end up like this?

t_ch: 我看到个表盘，然后拨动了它。
t_en: I saw a dial and got it moving.

t_ch: 对！这就说明你成功施展了钟表把戏！
t_en: Here comes the Clockwork!

t_ch: 我不知道啊…是我干的吗？
t_en: I have no clue what I did. You sure I pulled that off?

t_ch: 应该…是的吧？不然，他怎么会突然开始笑呢？
t_en: It... must have been? It's rather out of character for him to start cracking up like that all of a sudden.

t_ch: 只是…噢，他的样子可真让人害怕——就像是真正的、喜怒无常的石头老板一样。
t_en: It's just that... seeing that gleeful smile on his face... he's just as scary as he was before.

t_ch: 哦，嗨，各位！请原谅我的冒昧，欢迎来到梦想之地匹诺康尼！
t_en: Hello, everyone! Please allow me to welcome all of you to Penacony, Land of the Dreams!

t_ch: 小的们，给我列队！好好欢迎我们的贵客！
t_en: Come on now, line up and give our honored guests a warm welcome!

t_ch: 是、是！
t_en: S—Sure!

t_ch: 预备——起！
t_en: Ready... Go!

t_ch: <size=36>欢迎来到梦想之地匹诺康尼！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Welcome to Penacony, Land of the Dreams!</size>

t_ch: 呃…谢谢你们？
t_en: Um... Thank you?

t_ch: 别客气，都是应该的！
t_en: It's my honor! It's only right we give guests a proper welcome!

t_ch: <size=36>都是应该的！</size>
t_en: <size=36>You're welcome!</size>

t_ch: 客气什么，都是自己人！
t_en: No need for such formalities. We're... a Family!

t_ch: 您说得对！在祂的眼中，我们都是一家人！
t_en: You're right! We're a family to THEM!

t_ch: <size=36>都是一家人！</size>
t_en: <size=36>We're a family!</size>

t_ch: 免礼，平身。
t_en: You may rise.

t_ch: 全听您的吩咐！您是我们最尊贵的客人——
t_en: We're at your disposal! You're our most distinguished guest!

t_ch: <size=36>您开心就好！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Your happiness is our priority!</size>

t_ch: 噢，天哪！看来你在他们心里有相当的分量啦。既然这样，你是不是也能叫他们离开了？
t_en: Wow! Seems like you've established yourself as an important figure around here. In that case, can you ask them to leave now?

t_ch: 谢谢你们的好意…
t_en: I appreciate the gesture...

t_ch: …但能给我们一些私人空间吗？
t_en: ...But, can we have some privacy, please?
